headline: Did Data Center Supply Constraints and Regional Shifts Just Shift CBRE Group's (CBRE) Investment Narrative?
summary: CBRE Group recently reported that data center capacity under construction in several major U.S. markets has fallen due to permitting, zoning, power constraints, and higher building costs, even as AI-related demand for such facilities remains strong. The same report highlights a geographic shift in data center development, with activity cooling in northern Virginia, Hillsboro, and Silicon Valley while accelerating in Chicago and Dallas–Fort Worth, signaling a rebalancing of where new capacity...

headline: Evaluating CubeSmart’s (CUBE) Valuation As Dividend Growth And CBRE Venture Signal Rebound Ambitions
summary: Shelf registration sets up CubeSmart’s next financing steps CubeSmart (CUBE) has filed an omnibus shelf registration covering common and preferred shares, depositary shares, subscription rights, warrants, and debt securities of CubeSmart L.P., giving the company flexibility to raise capital as needed. See our latest analysis for CubeSmart. CUBE’s share price has been firming, with a 1-month share price return of 11.48% and a year to date gain of 18.19%. The 1-year total shareholder return of...
